allow: PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(90\); do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $up = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:7474" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop\).StatusCode } catch { $null } } until \($up -eq 200 -or \(Get-Date\) -gt $deadline\); if \($up -eq 200\) { "Neo4j is UP on http://localhost:7474" } else { "Not up yet after 90s" })
